Am J Sports Med . 2023;51(11):2858-2868. doi:10.1177/03635465231188976 FiberTape® Cerclage for Glenoid Bone Loss Metal-Free Bone Graft Fixation Specialty Cannulas Gemini™ SR8 Cannula This 8.25 mm cannula is ideal for joint access and expands to allow for tissue retraction. Deployable distal wings prevent cannula “fall-out” and allow for tissue retraction Telescopic inner sleeve provides a clear, unobstructed view and access to the pathology Low-Profile Cannula Percutaneous Kit Precisely place a small 5 mm clear cannula for direct visualization of curved FiberTak® guides, crescent SutureLasso™ suture passer, suture retriever, and mini suture cutter. Smooth soft-tissue insertion with a cannulated wire pathway and unique trocar cutting tip Mattress Suture Pass - Reverse the wire loop through the lasso to complete Simple Suture Pass Crescent 30° Straight 90° Straight 90° Tight Curve 45° Curve, right/left 25° Tight Curve, right/left 90° Curve, right/left SutureLasso ™ Suture Passers ■ Small 1.8 mm distal tip for atraumatic passage ■ Multiple curves and configurations available for all instability soft-tissue passes ■ Thumb wheels or thumb pad options available to advance nitinol wire loop, FiberStick™, or monofilament sutures Mini KingFisher® Suture Retriever/Grasper AR-13972SR Mini Suture Cutter AR-13255 Mini Hand Instruments ■ Manages both handling of tape sutures and tissue grasping ■ Dexterity and precision of the standard suture retriever ■ Available in both standard and WishBone™ handles ■ Fits through small 5 mm low-profile cannula ■ Closed-end cutter slides down suture to cut flush to bone ■ Available in both standard and WishBone handles ■ Fits through small 5 mm low-profile cannula Instability Express Instrument System Streamlined, Customizable, Efficient ■ Instability-specific instruments for procedural efficiency ■ Configurable to surgeon preferences Compact, single-level footprint Express Full arthrex.com © 2025-08 Arthrex, Inc.
